case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. ALLEGHENY CASUALTY COMPANY

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302,REAL PARTY IN INTEREST SHEILA B. LOCKETT BAIL BONDS RE-NOTICE OF MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND EXONERATE BAIL PER PENAL CODE SECTION 1305(B) ($15,000): ARGUED AND THE COURT GRANTED THE MOTION. MR. GRIM TO PREPARE ORDER. (302/AJR/AA) COURT REPORTER PATRICIA M. EVEZICH, CSR #1193

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY CASUALTY COMPANY $15,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $111.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,111.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
